column13: @Web returns converted Markdown (readable text), not raw HTML. File saved as raw_output_BL-1.txt is 4,817 bytes of Markdown-formatted content. Expected HTML is ~85KB; conversion strips boilerplate, CSS, navigation. To measure raw HTML response, would need curl-based measurement outside Cursor chat. This explains perception gap: interpreted track (1,953 chars) vs raw track (4,817 bytes) — both are the same Markdown content, just formatted differently by Cursor chat UI.
